## Summary

Describe the problem and the change briefly.

## Type of change

- [ ] Small bug fix
- [ ] Documentation or sample update
- [ ] Behavior change
- [ ] Public API or architectural change

## Related links

Link the related issue or discussion.

## Current behavior

Describe the current behavior.

## Proposed behavior

Describe the new behavior after this PR.

## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated automated tests
- [ ] Manually verified the change
- [ ] No test added

If no test was added, explain why.

Describe how this change was validated.

## Scope check

- [ ] This PR is focused on one purpose.
- [ ] I avoided unrelated refactoring.
- [ ] I updated docs or samples when relevant.
- [ ] I discussed the change first if it affects behavior, architecture, or public API.
